titleStmt.title: SII 40.217: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 217. (A.R. No. B. 262 of 1933.) Bhṛigubaṇḍa, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone set up to the south of the Chennakēśavasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1429, Prabhava, Chaitra, śu. 5, Thursday, corresponding to 1508 A.D., March 7. However the week day was Tuesday.
Records the consecration of the image of Hanumān in the village Bhṛigumaṇḍa by the minister Makkapāṭi Siṅgana, son of Pinna-Gōpaya and Bāvanāṁbikā (of Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Kāsyapagōtra).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī lakṣmī narasiṁhvakṛpā līlāva¨rdha
māna bhōgyōnnatuṁḍaivālanēkādasivra
tasīluṁḍu bhṛgumaṁḍḍamaṁtri siṁggana
velasenu . tanayuṁḍḍu bāvamāṁbika
ku Anaghaṁḍu śrībhaṭṭaraḷagharayyaku pri
yuḍainaṭi pinnagōpaya siṁgana ghanuṁḍā
Āpastaṁbasūtra kāśyapagōtṛṁḍu . varavi
bhavaṁbutōḍa śakava¨rṣamulabjajanētravā¨rdhi
sāgarasutu saṁkhyaneṁnnikakuṁ galgina yāpra
bhavābdacaitra maṁdaruḍagu śuddha paṁcami
bṛhaspativāsaramaṁddu lagnasusthiramuna
makkapāṭipura śiṁggana cēseṁbratiṣṭha vāyu
¨rjunu . śrīmatē rāmānujāyanamaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 40.217 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
